step.title: Define audience and purpose
step.action: Identify who will see this deck and what decision or action it should drive. Load content-brief or brand-guidelines if available.

step.title: Establish the narrative arc
step.action: Design the story flow before any slides. What is the opening hook? What is the core message? What is the call to action? Story first, slides second.

step.title: Design message hierarchy
step.action: For each section of the arc, define the key message. Apply the pyramid principle — lead with the conclusion, support with evidence.

step.title: Specify slides
step.action: Design each slide: title, key message, content notes, visual direction, and job (inform, persuade, or transition). One idea per slide — no exceptions.

step.title: Review and cut
step.action: Review every slide. If it does not advance the narrative, move it to the appendix or cut it. White space is breathing room for ideas.

step.title: Produce the slide deck artifact
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md. Fill all sections with slide specifications.
